MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-20-2019 IN 206 -- APPEARANCES BY DEENA ZACHARIN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF TERRY MCINTOSH; AUSTIN B. KENNEY, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A. -- PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE / PREFERENTIAL SETTING -- THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS 10/07/2019 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 WITH A LAST DAY OF 10/18/19. LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS IS 10/03/19. SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS SHALL BE BROUGHT ON REGULAR NOTICE PURSUANT TO THE RELEVANT PROVISION OF THE C.C.P., UNLESS THE PARTIES STIPULATE OTHERWISE. TIME TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY NOT YET SERVED IS SHORTENED TO 20 DAYS. RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY ALREADY SERVED ARE DUE 20 DAYS OF THIS HEARING OR BY THE DATE DETERMINED BY THE C.C.P., WHICHEVER IS EARLIER. FACT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 9/27/19. EXPERT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 10/04/19. ELECTRONIC SERVICE IS EQUIVALENT TO PERSONAL SERVICE. IF THERE IS ANY KIND OF ISSUE/DISPUTE THAT REQUIRES MEET AND CONFER, SUCH MEET AND CONFER SHALL NOT BE MADE VIA E-MAIL OR LETTER. IT SHALL OCCUR IN PERSON OR VIA TELEPHONE. ORDER SIGNED.
